architecture.summary: CLI init refactoring - remove single/multi branching, always create repositories/ structure. No architectural changes to runtime. Stage 1 of 2-stage change.

integrations.summary: N/A - no external service integrations. Internal CLI commands and config only.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI-only changes. Init prompts simplified (fewer questions). Banner text updated.

performance.summary: N/A - init-time changes only, no runtime performance impact.

security.summary: N/A - no auth, credentials, or permission changes.

edge-cases.summary: Existing single-repo users NOT migrated in Stage 1. Only new inits affected. Out-of-scope items explicitly listed.
